gnews_* / spaceflight_* nullable fields override global per-provider
fetch_config.get(field, provider) resolves effective value

div.div:
with_retry()
Up to max_attempts with exponential backoff (backoff × 2^attempt)
Retriable: 429 · 500 · 502 · 503 · 504 · Timeout · ConnectionError
Non-retriable: 4xx (excl. 429) → raises ArticleFetchError immediately
All attempts exhausted → raises ArticleFetchError

_deduplicate(): removes articles with duplicate URLs, first-seen order wins
